title: 10 best herbal tinctures for jaw clenching
description: Skullcap tinctures helps with jaw clenching because it contains a compound called baicalin, which has a calming effect on the nervous system. When taken as a supplement, skullcap tincture can help reduce anxiety and stress, common triggers of jaw clenching. Additionally, skullcap's sedative properties can help relax the muscles in the face and jaw, reducing tension and discomfort associated with bruxism.
